body.title: stop_swarm engram
body.result: stop_swarm() tool in cluster_ssh.py — drops exit.flag on all swarm instances via SSH + local. PROC_STOP_SWARM habit seeded with trigger phrases. twm_ttl_seconds=300.
body.description: Build stop_swarm as an Igor engram — drops exit.flag on all remote instances via SSH (same path as update_swarm), drops locally too. Trigger: stop swarm, bring down all igors, maintenance window. No restart. Analogous to PROC_SWARM_UPDATE.
